message:
fix(command): PSYNC FULLRESYNC uses real server_run_id instead of 40-zero placeholder (br-frankenredis-fcjh, partial)

Previously psync_cmd returned a FULLRESYNC with a hardcoded
0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 replid. Any client that PSYNC'd
with an already-known replid and tried the partial-resync path would get
inconsistent replids across reconnects. Wire in store.server_run_id (the
same 40-char hex the INFO replication master_replid field already uses
at line 9279) so PSYNC, CLUSTER MYID, and INFO replication agree on the
same run-id string across a single server lifetime.

Offset still 0 — backlog tracking is a separate piece of the fcjh
scope; see bead for the full replication-pipeline contract.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
